welcome.line2: We're here to help you understand what's really inside the food you eat.

intro.cardBody: Let's take a moment to walk you through the app and show you how to make the most of it. We'll go step-by-step, so it's easy to follow!

navigation.title: This is your tab navigation!
navigation.subtitle: This where all your 'quick-access' limits live.

food_scanner.title: The heart of our app is the Food Scanner.
food_scanner.subtitle: It really is as simple as tapping the food scanner in the tab nav and scanning the barcode.

skip.title: Skip App Tour
skip.message: Are you sure you wish to skip the App tour?
